questions.q: Alphabet's AI-driven drug discovery firm, Isomorphic Labs, announced on May 13, 2026, that it raised $2.1 billion in a funding round led by which venture capital firm?

Former Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz penned a Wall Street Journal op-ed recently describing which city's business climate as 'hostile'?
Alexander Lukashenko stated that his country is preparing for war and planning a selective mobilization of military units. Which country does he lead?

Which major tech company was forced to cancel a highly polluting natural gas plant project intended to power its 'Project Jupiter' AI data center?
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy recently announced preparations for a military drone deal with which country?
